scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p wfc-core && wasm-bindgen --target web ./target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/wfc_core.wasm --out-dir ./packages/wfc/wasm && wasm-opt -Oz --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int ./packages/wfc/wasm/wfc_core_bg.wasm -o ./packages/wfc/wasm/wfc_core_bg.wasm
